doc.trigger: Webhook to receive incoming leads data
doc.overview: This workflow automates the qualification process for inbound leads by verifying their contact information and assessing their fit with the company's Ideal Customer Profile (ICP). It integrates various services to enrich, validate, and store lead data efficiently in Airtable and Pipedrive.
phases: Lead data is received through a webhook for processing.
Contact and company information is verified and enriched using various APIs and services.
Leads are assessed against predefined criteria to determine their qualification status.
Qualified leads are saved into Airtable and Pipedrive for further action.
nodes: Receives incoming lead data via HTTP request.
Processes and restores data received from the webhook.
Prepares data if a lead is rejected based on qualification criteria.
Merges lead data with associated person and organization information.
Requests an access token from Snov for verification purposes.
Initiates the email verification process using Snov.
Delays for 15 seconds to allow email verification to process.
Retrieves the result of the email verification from Snov.
Parses and sets the email verification results for further checks.
Executes qualification checks based on the email verification result.
Determines if the email passed the qualification checks.
Processes the result of the person name verification.
Checks if the phone number has an associated carrier.
Saves the results of the phone verification process.
Evaluates the overall score of the lead's data quality.
Assesses if the job position fits within the target criteria.
Analyzes the main goals of the lead to ensure alignment.
Combines results of various ICP qualification checks.
Compiles the final qualification result based on checks.
Processes and validates the company name from leads.
Checks if the domain matches the company name provided.
Creates a new registration record in Airtable for the lead.
Verifies if the provided email is personal or professional.
Validates if the lead's country aligns with the target market.
Constructs a structured lead record for further processing.
Uses OpenAI to match domains with corresponding companies.
Validates the company name using GPT for accuracy.
Verifies the phone number through an external API.
Aggregates the results of various validation processes.
Validates the person's name against known profiles.
Updates data hygiene records in Airtable.
Updates the qualification status for the lead in Airtable.
Checks if the lead qualifies for entry into Pipedrive.
Creates a new organization record in Pipedrive.
Adds a new person record in Pipedrive linked to the organization.
Prepares data necessary for creating a deal in Pipedrive.
Creates a new deal in Pipedrive associated with the lead.
Stores the created deal ID in Airtable for tracking.
Sends lead data for enrichment to Clay.
Prepares the data format required by Clay for enrichment.
Merges deal IDs with corresponding Airtable IDs.
Extracts necessary IDs for storing information in Airtable.
Categorizes the email domain to assess quality.
Checks if the email verification process is complete.
Determines if the email is ready for further processing.
Searches for existing person records in Pipedrive.
Determines if a person record already exists in Pipedrive.
Checks if the person search returned a valid result.
Updates the existing person record in Pipedrive.
Standardizes the format of the person ID for consistency.
Checks if the qualification pipeline is functioning correctly.
Waits for processes involving person and organization to complete.
Searches for existing organization records in Pipedrive.
Verifies if the organization record already exists.
Checks the result of the organization duplication check.
Adds a note for duplicate organization records in Pipedrive.
Checks the response from Clay to determine success.
Determines if the enrichment process via Clay was unsuccessful.
Pauses for 5 seconds before retrying the enrichment.
Retries sending data for enrichment to Clay if it previously failed.
Marks emails as rejected in Airtable if they do not qualify.
doc.notes: Ensure to monitor API limits and error handling as multiple external requests are made throughout the workflow.
